backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a simple bale management system with CRUD operations (addBale, toggleAngry, getBale, getAllBales, angryBaleCount) using a Map-based store with auto-incrementing IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: frontend component rendering verification and frontend-backend connection verification via generated declarations.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summary of frontend files describing the cotton quality reporting dashboard components, hooks, and styling with print functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for a neutral agricultural-themed UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Cotton Quality Report application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component orchestrating the cotton quality dashboard with header, form, statistics, table, print functionality, and footer with social links.
frontend/src/components/BaleEntryForm.ts: Form component with six numeric inputs (Rd, Trash, Moisture, Micronaire, Length, Strength) that validates and submits JSON-encoded quality metrics to the backend via useAddBale mutation.
frontend/src/components/BaleRecordsTable: Sortable table component displaying bale records with parsed quality metrics, supporting column-based sorting and print-optimized styling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header component displaying report title, lot reference, current date, and completion status badge that turns green when 100 bales are entered.
Statistics dashboard component calculating and displaying average values for Micronaire, Length, Strength, and Trash percentage across all bales with parsed JSON metrics.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and providing login/logout functionality with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hooks for fetching all bales (useGetAllBales) and adding new bales (useAddBale) through the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, plus print-specific media queries for report generation styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens using OKLCH, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features for a cotton quality reporting application including bale entry forms, statistics display, sortable tables, print functionality, and backend integration status.
